subcodes.first_line: O Thou who art disgraced before that Loving Friend! By what virtue may I praise Thee? The greatest praise is to declare [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رسوای آندلبر مهربان بچه منقبتی ترا بستایم بهترین ستایش اینست که بگویم
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @pain of love; love as veil, @high station of the true believer
